translation.landing_hero_subtitle: Christ's Shoulder connects your mission to mentorship, with tools for a deeper and guided spiritual journey.
translation.landing_feature1_desc: Reflections that nourish the soul and direct your purpose.
translation.landing_feature2_desc: A safe space to record your prayers and thoughts.
translation.landing_feature3_desc: Receive support, prayer, and guidance with complete privacy.

translation.legal_terms_intro: Welcome to Christ's Shoulder. These Terms of Use ('Terms') govern your access to and use of our mobile application and web services ('Platform'). By creating an account or using our Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
translation.legal_terms_1_p1: By using the Platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to comply with these Terms, our Privacy Policy, and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with these Terms, you should not use the Platform.
translation.legal_terms_2_p1: The Christ's Shoulder Platform is intended to strengthen the spiritual journey through devotionals, a personal diary, and a mentorship system. Users of the platform are classified as 'Mission Member' or 'Mentorship'.
translation.legal_terms_3_li1: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.
translation.legal_terms_3_li2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and account.
translation.legal_terms_3_li3: All information provided during registration and profile updates must be true, accurate, and complete.
translation.legal_terms_3_li4: You are solely responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
translation.legal_terms_4_p1: You agree not to use the Platform to:
translation.legal_terms_4_li1: Post content that is illegal, offensive, defamatory, hateful, or violates the rights of third parties.
translation.legal_terms_4_li2: Harass, abuse, or harm another person.
translation.legal_terms_4_li3: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems.
translation.legal_terms_4_li4: Use the Platform for any commercial purpose without our prior written consent.
translation.legal_terms_5_li1: Users with the Mission Member role can maintain a personal diary.
translation.legal_terms_5_li2: Diary entries are private by default.
translation.legal_terms_5_li3: Mission Members have the option to share specific entries with their designated Mentorship. By sharing, you grant the Mentorship permission to view the content of that specific entry for the purpose of providing spiritual support and guidance.
translation.legal_terms_5_li4: To enable sharing, you must set your gender in your profile and select a Mentorship.
translation.legal_terms_5_li5: Neither Christ's Shoulder nor its Admin Team has access to the content of your diary, whether shared or not.
translation.legal_terms_6_li1: The content provided by the Platform, including devotionals, texts, graphics, and logos, is our property or that of our licensors and is protected by copyright laws.
translation.legal_terms_6_li2: The content you create (such as diary entries) remains your property.
translation.legal_terms_7_li1: The relationship between a Mentorship and a Mission Member is based on volunteerism and spiritual support.
translation.legal_terms_7_li2: Users with the Mentorship role are not professional counselors, therapists, or licensed mental health professionals, unless otherwise specified. The guidance provided is spiritual in nature and does not replace professional advice.
translation.legal_terms_7_li3: Christ's Shoulder is not responsible for the conduct or advice given by users. We encourage each user to exercise their own discernment.
translation.legal_terms_8_li1: We may suspend or terminate your account at any time, for any reason, including violation of these Terms.
translation.legal_terms_8_li2: You can delete your account at any time in your profile settings. Account deletion is permanent and will result in the removal of all your data, including diary entries.
translation.legal_terms_9_p1: The Platform is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee that the Platform will be uninterrupted or error-free. In no event shall we be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the Platform.
translation.legal_terms_10_p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of any significant changes. Continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
translation.legal_terms_11_p1: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us.
translation.legal_privacy_intro: Your privacy is of utmost importance to us. This Privacy Policy describes how the Christ's Shoulder Platform ('Platform', 'we', 'our') collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
translation.legal_privacy_1_a_header: a) Information you provide to us:
translation.legal_privacy_1_li1: Account Registration: We collect your full name, email address, and church.
translation.legal_privacy_1_li2: Profile: To enable the mentorship connection, we ask you to set your gender in your profile. This information is strictly used to connect Mission Members to Mentorships of the same gender.
translation.legal_privacy_1_li3: Diary Content: Your diary entries are stored on our servers. This content is encrypted and private. You have full control over it and can choose to share it with your Mentorship.
translation.legal_privacy_1_li4: Usage Data: We may collect information about how you interact with the Platform, such as the features you use and the time you spend. This helps us improve our services.
translation.legal_privacy_1_li5: Device Information: We may collect information about your device, such as model, operating system, and unique identifiers, for troubleshooting and analysis purposes.
translation.legal_privacy_2_li1: To Provide and Maintain the Service: We use your information to operate the Platform, authenticate access, provide devotionals, and facilitate diary and mentorship functionality.
translation.legal_privacy_2_li2: Communication: We may use your email to send important notifications about your account, service updates, or changes to our policies.
translation.legal_privacy_2_li3: Personalization: We use information like your name and gender to personalize your experience and make the correct Mentorship assignment.
translation.legal_privacy_2_li4: Security and Protection: We use the information to protect the security and integrity of our service and its users.
translation.legal_privacy_3_p1: Your privacy is our priority. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
translation.legal_privacy_3_li1: Mentorship: If you are a Mission Member and choose to share a diary entry, that specific entry will be visible to your designated Mentorship. No other information or entry is shared without your explicit action.
translation.legal_privacy_3_li2: Legal Obligations: We may disclose your information if required by law or if we believe in good faith that such action is necessary to comply with a legal process.
translation.legal_privacy_3_li3: Service Providers: We use third-party service providers (like Supabase for backend and storage) that process data on our behalf. Such providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and may only use it for the purposes we specify.
translation.legal_privacy_4_p1: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information.
translation.legal_privacy_4_li1: Encryption: The content of your diary is encrypted in our database.
translation.legal_privacy_4_li2: Restricted Access: Direct access to the database is strictly limited to authorized personnel. Our Admin Team cannot view the content of your diary entries.
translation.legal_privacy_4_li3: Secure Authentication: We use secure authentication methods to protect access to your account.
translation.legal_privacy_5_li1: Access and Update: You can review and update your profile information at any time on the Platform.
translation.legal_privacy_5_li2: Account Deletion: You can permanently delete your account in the profile settings section. Deletion will result in the complete and irreversible removal of all your data, including name, email, and all diary entries.
translation.legal_privacy_5_li3: Diary Sharing: You have full control over which diary entries, if any, are shared with your Mentorship.
translation.legal_privacy_6_p1: Our service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
translation.legal_privacy_7_p1: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time.
translation.legal_privacy_8_p1: If you have any questions or concerns about our Privacy Policy, please contact us.
